activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor identified anywhere in invoice (consolidation rule)
Goods description verification primarily via article number
Quantity verification by direct numeric value identification
Thousand separator normalization for quantity verification
China and Hong Kong treated as equivalent countries

consignor.certificate_value:
EKMAN AND CO AB
POLHEMSPLATSEN 5,
P.O. BOX 230,
SE-401 23, GOTHENBURG,
SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value:
Ekman & Co AB
Polhemsplatsen 5
PO Box 230
SE-401 23 Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor name 'EKMAN AND CO AB' from certificate is found explicitly in the invoice text including in header and address block with minor allowed normalization differences (e.g., '&' vs 'AND', comune in Gothenburg spelling). The legal form abbreviation 'AB' is recognized and normalized. The country 'SWEDEN' matches exactly after normalization. No conflicting consignor name found. Rule 4.1.0 confirmed explicit identification anywhere in invoice. Rule 4.1.3.6 applied for legal form abbreviation.

consignee.certificate_value:
TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP HONGKONG
INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED
FLAT/RM 3701, 37/F, TOWER ONE LIPPO
CENTER, 89 QUEENSWAY, HK
China
consignee.invoice_value:
TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP
HONGKONG
INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED
FLAT/RM 3701,37/F,TOWER ONE
LIPPO
CENTER,89 QUEENSWAY, HK
consignee.motivation: Consignee from certificate 'TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP HONGKONG INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED' matches exactly with invoice consignee/SOLD TO field after normalization for legal form and punctuation. Address details match including apartment and floor details, city (HK), and country 'China' in certificate matches invoice context. Prioritization rule 4.2.0.2 applied to confirm match in primary conseignee field.

goods_description.certificate_value: CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP
goods_description.invoice_value: CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate and invoice text matches exactly with no differences. The description 'CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP' is identical and found verbatim in both documents. Rule 4.3.2 applied for exact text match.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate 'GW 617 632 KGS' matches invoice 'Gross Weight: 617 632 Kgs' after normalization of thousands separator and allowed abbreviation of Gross Weight (GW). No discrepancies in numeric value or unit. Rule 4.4.3 for numeric verification and 4.4.3.3 for thousands separator normalization applied.

origin.motivation: Origin country 'PORTUGAL' in certificate is explicitly stated as 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: PORTUGAL' in the invoice. EU origin normalization applied but certificate specifically indicates PORTUGAL and invoice confirms same. No conflicting origins present. Rule 4.5.4.1 applied.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity and origin match exactly after allowed normalizations with no discrepancies or conflicts detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens exakt och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
